name: path-to-academia
description: Guided agent workspace for building auditable academic opportunity databases.

interface.shortDescription: Guide agents from intake to audited academic opportunity databases.
interface.longDescription: path to academia helps agents ask the right intake questions, configure a domain brief, collect source evidence, verify identity, deduplicate, audit, export, and browse academic people, groups, and position data while keeping private outreach state separate from facts.
defaultPrompt: Run Guided Intake for a new academic opportunity workspace.
Initialize an ML and biology workspace after recording assumptions.
Audit my path to academia workspace and export a wrapped XLSX.
